page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/'>

    def test_pagination_next_previous_behavior(page):
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 1: Login
        # ---------------------------------------
        page.goto("https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login")
    
        page.get_by_role("textbox", name="User ID").fill("CSASINHN")
        page.get_by_role("textbox", name="Password").fill("GOLD950")
        page.get_by_role("button", name="Login").click()
    
        page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 2: Navigate to Orders page
        # ---------------------------------------
        orders_button = page.get_by_role("complementary") \
            .get_by_role("button", name="Orders", exact=True)
    
        expect(orders_button).to_be_visible(timeout=10000)
        orders_button.click()
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Helper: Capture first row (to compare pages)
        # ---------------------------------------
        def get_first_row_text():
            return page.locator(".ag-row").first.inner_text()
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 3: Verify 'Previous' disabled on page 1
        # ---------------------------------------
        prev_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Previous")
        expect(prev_button).to_be_disabled()
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 4: Click 'Next' → Page 2
        # ---------------------------------------
        first_row_page1 = get_first_row_text()
    
        next_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Next")
        expect(next_button).to_be_enabled()
        next_button.click()
    
        first_row_page2 = get_first_row_text()
    
        # Validate page changed (data should differ)
        assert first_row_page1 != first_row_page2, \
            "Page 2 did not load new data ❌"
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 5: Click 'Next' → Page 3
        # ---------------------------------------
        next_button.click()
    
        first_row_page3 = get_first_row_text()
    
        assert first_row_page2 != first_row_page3, \
            "Page 3 did not load new data ❌"
    
        # ---------------------------------------
        # Step 6: Navigate to last page (direct)
        # ---------------------------------------
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
        page.get_by_role("button", name="3", exact=True).click()
        last_page_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="27047", exact=True)
    
        # Verify 'Next' is disabled on last page
        next_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Next")
